title: Cod Skin Pet Roll Treats Omega 3 Dog Puppy Reward Snack Low Fat Easily Digestible
features: TASTY: Made with 100% premium-quality cod, these delicious treats are packed with natural flavour and goodness. They offer a satisfying crunch that dogs love, making them an excellent choice for a nutritious and wholesome treat.

HEALTHY: These cod skin treats are naturally low in fat and free from artificial colours, flavours, grains, and gluten, making them a gentle and easily digestible option for dogs of all sizes, including those with sensitive stomachs or dietary restrictions.

BENEFITS: A great natural source of Omega 3 and 6 fatty acids, these treats support overall well-being by helping to maintain healthy skin and a shiny coat, while also promoting strong joints and mobility for an active lifestyle.

CONVENIENT: Packaged in a resealable pouch to preserve freshness, these treats stay crisp and full of flavour for longer. The convenient packaging also makes them easy to store and perfect for taking on walks, trips, or training sessions.
SIZE: Choose between 3 sizes including 13cm, 10cm and 7cm treats. Their size makes them ideal for rewarding good behaviour, training sessions, or simply as a satisfying and nutritious snack.
description: Product Description Dog Treats Made with 100% premium-quality cod, these natural dog treats are rich in flavour and packed with essential nutrients. Offering a satisfying crunch dogs love, they’re a great alternative to traditional dog bones or dog dental sticks. Naturally low in fat and free from grains, gluten, and artificial additives, they’re gentle on sensitive stomachs and ideal for all breeds. Whether used as dog training treats or a daily snack, they offer a wholesome way to reward good behaviour. Made with real cod skin These cod skin treats are a natural source of omega 3 fish oil and essential oil, supporting healthy skin, a glossy coat, and strong joints for active dogs. With three convenient sizes—7cm, 10cm, and 13cm—they suit any need from quick rewards to longer-lasting chews. Packaged in a resealable pouch, they stay fresh and crunchy, perfect for walks, trips, or training. These treats are a smart, healthy choice for any pet owner looking to support their dog’s wellbeing.
